reasoning: At 1x the icon reads as a tiny green smudge — the checkmark-in-circle motif is not instantly legible and the silhouette has no distinct toy-charm shape. At 4x the pixel construction is technically clean: green circle base with a yellow pixel border ring and a dark checkmark stroke, which gives decent contrast on both the mid-tone beige bg and the dark bg. On the light bg it holds reasonably well. However the form is angular-pixelated rather than round/soft — the circle feels jagged and the overall impression is 'generic retro icon' rather than friendly toy charm. No visible personality or sticker-test appeal. Passes basic contrast but fails the charm and 1x-readability bars.
